games.name: Catan
games.description: Trade and build settlements on an island of hexagonal tiles.

games.name: Ticket to Ride
games.description: Collect cards and claim railway routes across the map.

games.name: Pandemic
games.description: Cooperate to stop four deadly diseases from spreading worldwide.

games.name: Azul
games.description: Draft colorful tiles and create beautiful mosaic patterns.

games.name: Wingspan
games.description: Attract birds to your wildlife preserve in this engine-building game.

games.name: 7 Wonders
games.description: Draft cards to develop your ancient civilization and build a wonder.

games.name: Codenames
games.description: Give one-word clues to help your team guess the right words.

games.name: Terraforming Mars
games.description: Compete as corporations to make Mars habitable for humanity.

games.name: Scythe
games.description: Control factions in an alternate 1920s with mechs and farming.

games.name: Gloomhaven
games.description: Tactical combat dungeon crawler with a persistent campaign.

games.name: Spirit Island
games.description: Play as island spirits defending your home from colonizers.

games.name: Dominion
games.description: Build your deck of cards to create the most efficient kingdom.

games.name: Splendor
games.description: Collect gem tokens to purchase development cards and earn prestige.

games.name: Carcassonne
games.description: Place tiles to build a medieval landscape and claim features.

games.name: Root
games.description: Asymmetric woodland warfare where each faction plays differently.

games.name: Everdell
games.description: Build a city of woodland critters through worker placement.

games.name: Ark Nova
games.description: Plan and build a modern zoo focused on conservation and science.

games.name: Brass: Birmingham
games.description: Build industries and networks in the English Midlands.

games.name: Cascadia
games.description: Create habitats and populate them with Pacific Northwest wildlife.

games.name: Dune: Imperium
games.description: Deck-building meets worker placement on the desert planet Arrakis.

games.name: Viticulture
games.description: Manage a vineyard in Tuscany through seasonal worker placement.

games.name: Blood Rage
games.description: Lead Viking clans to glory before Ragnarök destroys the world.

games.name: Concordia
games.description: Trade and colonize the Mediterranean in ancient Roman times.

games.name: Patchwork
games.description: Compete to build the most aesthetic quilt from Tetris-like patches.

games.name: Agricola
games.description: Develop your farm, raise livestock, and feed your family.

games.name: Great Western Trail
games.description: Drive cattle from Texas to Kansas City along the trail.

games.name: King of Tokyo
games.description: Play as mutant monsters battling for control of Tokyo.

games.name: Clank!
games.description: Sneak into a dragon's lair to steal treasure using deck-building.

games.name: Mysterium
games.description: A ghost sends visions to psychics to solve a murder mystery.

games.name: Power Grid
games.description: Build power plants and supply electricity to cities across the network.

games.name: Race for the Galaxy
games.description: Build a galactic civilization through simultaneous card play.

games.name: Sushi Go Party!
games.description: Draft adorable sushi cards to score the most points.

games.name: Quacks of Quedlinburg
games.description: Push your luck brewing potions as rival quack doctors.

games.name: Star Wars: Rebellion
games.description: Epic galactic conflict between the Empire and Rebel Alliance.

games.name: Cosmic Encounter
games.description: Negotiate, ally, and betray other alien species to colonize planets.

games.name: Twilight Imperium
games.description: An epic space opera of galactic domination and political intrigue.

games.name: Nemesis
games.description: Survive alien intruders on a spaceship with hidden objectives.

games.name: Photosynthesis
games.description: Grow trees in a forest competing for sunlight as it moves.

games.name: Calico
games.description: Design a cozy quilt to attract the cuddliest cats.

games.name: Dixit
games.description: Use dreamlike illustrations to tell stories and guess clues.

games.name: Undaunted: Normandy
games.description: WWII deck-building tactical combat across Normandy scenarios.

games.name: Clank! In! Space!
games.description: Sneak aboard an evil lord's spaceship to steal artifacts.

games.name: Hive
games.description: Abstract strategy with insect tiles — surround the opponent's queen.

games.name: The Crew
games.description: Cooperative trick-taking in a space-themed mission campaign.

games.name: Jaipur
games.description: Trade goods in an Indian market to become the Maharaja's merchant.

games.name: Santorini
games.description: Build towers on the Greek island and race to the top.

games.name: Oath
games.description: A living game of politics and power that changes between plays.

games.name: Marvel Champions
games.description: Play as Marvel heroes fighting villains in a cooperative LCG.

games.name: Res Arcana
games.description: Alchemists compete using a tiny deck of powerful artifacts.

games.name: Lost Ruins of Arnak
games.description: Explore a mysterious island combining deck-building and worker placement.
